0:
Petyr Winsome, a reporter for the <Emphasis>Harbor Herald</Emphasis> in Limsa Lominsa, wishes to interview an adventurer.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Petyr Winsome, a reporter for the <Emphasis>Harbor Herald</Emphasis> in Limsa Lominsa, wishes to interview an adventurer.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Petyr Winsome wishes you to participate in one of the monster-culling operations taking place at Three-malm Bend in middle La Noscea and Quarterstone in western La Noscea, and regale him with an account of your firsthand experience.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

Petyr Winsome wishes you to participate in one of the monster-culling operations taking place at Three-malm Bend in middle La Noscea and Quarterstone in western La Noscea, and regale him with an account of your firsthand experience.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

50:
I am especially curious about the spawning megalocrabs out at Three-malm Bend, and a particularly ravenous dodo dubbed Gertrude running rampant at Quarterstone. Should you encounter any of these creatures, I would greatly appreciate aught you might share with me!
...And though I doubt not your integrity, would you mind returning with some physical evidence of your efforts? I have a reputation as a seeker of truth to maintain, you understand!
